_comment: ExplorerLens Engine Performance Baselines — v24.1.0 Altair-R
_description: Reference values measured on i7-12700K + RTX 3080 @ 64GB DDR5. Used by performance-regression-gate.yml to block PRs that regress beyond the configured thresholds.

benchmarks.name: BM_SingleDecode_JPEG
benchmarks.description: Median JPEG decode + render time for a 6MP image

benchmarks.name: BM_SingleDecode_PNG
benchmarks.description: Median PNG decode + render for a 4K image

benchmarks.name: BM_SingleDecode_PDF
benchmarks.description: Median PDF first-page render via MuPDF

benchmarks.name: BM_SingleDecode_RAW
benchmarks.description: Median RAW (LibRaw) decode for a 24MP CR2

benchmarks.name: BM_BatchDecode_Mixed
benchmarks.description: Mixed-format batch decode throughput (images per second)

benchmarks.name: BM_CacheHit_SubMs
benchmarks.description: Sub-millisecond cache lookup time for a 256px thumbnail hit

benchmarks.name: BM_GpuUpload_ZeroCopy
benchmarks.description: Zero-copy GPU texture upload latency (256px RGBA)
